utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now assess full specification per item: 1) destination: provided and specific (Lisbon, Portugal) — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: specific dates given — fully specified. 3) transportation: flight details with type, description, and cost; lacks specific airline, flight numbers, and times, but the format only requires flight details with costs; details are present — count as fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs; name, stay length, and cost provided — fully specified. 5) activities: requires selected activities with costs; package says suggested but not booked, and user will explore independently; no selected/booked activities with costs — not fully specified. 6) additional_services: 'None' — acceptable as fully specified. 7) total_budget: provides confirmed costs and estimated total with breakdown elements — fully specified. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified.
